Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: object genres by cultural or intellectual evaluation [300234076], object genres (object classifications) [300185712], Object Genres (hierarchy name) [300185711], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Refers to relatively small household items, often collectibles such as ceramics, fans, or statuettes that are characterized by being ornamental, often having antiquarian interest, and typically being displayed on tables, shelves, or elsewhere in a living area. This term is generally not used for collections of natural history objects, coins, furniture, or fine art.
Referido a coleccionables, baratijas, y otros objetos de pequeño valor que se caracterizan por ser bonitos, ornamentales, o tienen interes para el anticuariado.
Verwijst naar verzamelobjecten, snuisterijen en andere voorwerpen met weinig waarde, die meestal worden gezien als mooi of decoratief, of die nauwelijks antiquarisch belang hebben.

Source.Source_ID: 2000046682/Random House Dictionary of the English Language (1987)
2000106166/Nomenclature for Museum Cataloging / Nomenclature pour le catalogage translation project (2016-)
